description_long: This house features a weathered stone exterior with a steep, multi-gabled roof covered in brown shingles. Moss and vegetation grow along the walls and roof edges, giving it an aged, slightly neglected appearance. The front facade includes a wooden door with metal accents, a hexagonal window above, and a small porch area supported by wooden beams. On one side, a wooden balcony is strung with laundry, and a large rock formation partially encroaches on the structure. The rear and side views reveal a tall chimney, additional windows, and more mossy stonework, as well as a barrel and sparse, leafless trees. The overall design suggests a rustic, possibly medieval or fantasy-inspired urban dwelling.
description: A weathered stone house with a steep, brown-shingled roof, mossy walls, and rustic wooden details, partially surrounded by rocks and sparse trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main wooden door, hexagonal window, porch, and laundry hanging on a side balcony.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tall chimney, roofline, and a large rock formation blocking part of the lower wall.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the mossy stone wall, chimney, laundry line, and the full extent of the rock formation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a large window, rock, barrel, and sparse tree, as well as the roof's layered structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Wooden door with metal accents, small porch, and overhanging roof supported by beams
